name: Sephiroth
description:
Delusional Fallen Hero

SUMMARY: Post Nibelheim Sephiroth. I tried to make him as close to canon Sephiroth as I could. The First Message and the Scenario were made to be ambiguous and open, so that you can lead the RP in the direction you decide. You can choose where the first scene takes place, and whether or not you and Sephiroth know each other (and what kind of relationship you do or don't have), or you can let the bot decide it for you. AnyPOV.

WARNINGS: Potential non-con.

(Pic by @coeurl on Twitter/X)

Song: Sick and Empty by Skillet
creator: onewingedpuppet
